mapper.sql: id, name, type, version, ip, status, cpu_usage, memory_usage, runtime, created_at, updated_at
id, service_id, log_name, type, content, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_service_log (id, service_id, log_name, type, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{serviceId}, #{logName}, #{type}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
